creator: Kai.Grossjohann@CS.Uni-Dortmund.DE
text:
I got the following error from compiling Emacs:
/usr/ports/editors/emacs20/work/emacs-20.3/lib-src/fakemail.c: In function `make_file_preface':
/usr/ports/editors/emacs20/work/emacs-20.3/lib-src/fakemail.c:375: warning: assi
/var/tmp/ccM281521.o: In function `make_file_preface':
/var/tmp/ccM281521.o(.text+0x3f2): undefined reference to `cuserid'

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/editors/emacs20
make
